texto: We may need to put down the book from time to time, but we should make sure not to let the computer become the new book. The universal medium, like the universal library, is a dream that does more harm than good.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrew Piper: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “We may need to put down the book from time to time, but we should make sure not to let the comput…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, ebooks, reading-books pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reading-books.
